sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἰῶτα

- Transliteration: Iota

- Phonetic: ee-o'-tah

- Definition:

1. the Hebrew letter `, the smallest of them all

a. hence equivalent to the minutest part

- Origin: of hebrew origin [the tenth letter of the hebrew alphabet]

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (the tenth letter of the hebrew alphabet); iota the name of the eighth letter of the Greek alphabet put (figuratively) for a very small part of anything: - jot.
